name: Encoding Event-B Proof Rules in Prolog: An Interactive Sequent Prover for ProB
summary: arXiv:2607.21191v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Event-B is a formal method rooted in predicate logic and set theory. We encoded over 600 proof rules in Prolog, enabling a systematic, comprehensib...
description: arXiv:2607.21191v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Event-B is a formal method rooted in predicate logic and set theory. We encoded over 600 proof rules in Prolog, enabling a systematic, comprehensible proof analysis and construction. By integrating the proof rules into the Prolog-based validation tool ProB, we obtain an interactive proof system with proof tree visualisation. This has advantages...
author: Katharina Engels (Heinrich Heine University D\"usseldorf), Jan Gruteser (Heinrich Heine University D\"usseldorf), Michael Leuschel (Heinrich Heine University D\"usseldorf)
